signInSubtitle: Sign in to your {productName} account to continue
brandQuote: Every day off-platform: fees slip, records diverge, and someone re-types the same list.
brandFeature1: Stop report card season from shutting down the office
brandFeature2: Stop chasing balances that hide in notebooks
brandFeature3: Stop parents queuing at the office for answers
brandFeature4: Stop deciding blind at term end

resetLinkSent: Reset link sent. Check your email.
getAccessSubtitle: Request access for your school. We'll review your application—usually within 1–2 business days.
pendingSubtitle: Your registration is in review. Until you're approved, your team keeps running on manual workflows.

suspendedSubtitle: Your school's access has been suspended.
suspendedDescription: Please contact support for more information.
registrationSuccess: Your school has been registered successfully.
checkEmail: Check your email for next steps.
registerSuccessEmailNote: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Confirm your email, then sign in—every day before approval is another day of manual workflows.
registerSuccessEmailNoteGeneric: Check your email for a confirmation link, then sign in. Until you're approved, your team keeps running on scattered tools.
registerBrandTitle: Your school already runs a system—it's just scattered

registerStep2: Launch your public site before the next intake

registerFormSubtitle: One afternoon of setup beats another term of manual chaos
accountAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in to finish setting up your school.

reviewTimeline: We typically review new schools within 1–2 business days.
afterApprovalHint: Once approved, invite your team from the Team page—every day they wait is another day of double entry.
